mapper.select: select ac.tenant_id as tenant_id, ac.approval_no as approval_no, ac.approval_type as approval_type, ac.approval_status as approval_status, ac.requester_id as requester_id, ac.approver_id as approver_id, ac.approval_reason as approval_reason, ac.rejection_reason as rejection_reason, ac.approved_at as approved_at from batch.approval_command ac where ac.approval_status in ('APPROVED', 'REJECTED', 'EXECUTED') and ac.approved_at is not null and ac.approved_at >= now() - (#{lookbackMinutes}::text || ' minutes')::interval and ac.requester_id is not null and not exists ( select 1 from batch.console_push_approval_notification n where n.tenant_id = ac.tenant_id and n.approval_no = ac.approval_no ) order by ac.approved_at asc limit #{batchSize}
mapper.insert: insert into batch.console_push_approval_notification (tenant_id, approval_no) values (#{tenantId}, #{approvalNo}) on conflict (tenant_id, approval_no) do nothing
